narrative:
Tallmadge 4-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,070 registered voters, with 64.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
